name: DC RPG Hypnotized v3.5 | Altered Common Sense | DC Mind Control/Hypnosis (+DC Comics Lorebook/Script)
description:
What if you could use hypnosis in the world of DC Comics?

ㅤ

ㅤ

List of Characters added (so far): click here

Lorebook: click here

Hi, I'm the creator of the original "DC Common Sense Hypnosis - Superpowers RPG" with a brand new, revamped version of that bot.

You can also try out my MARVEL RPG Hypnotized v3.5 bot.

ㅤ

ㅤ

What's new?

  • A HUGE Lorebook/Scripts added (with characters' relationships, lore, history, personality descriptions, etc)... It mirrors most of the canon events of DC Comics. Each important piece of information about each character will appear ONLY when you mention it in your adventure in the story (or at least that's how it should work 💀 PLEASE! Lorebook, bot, work properly! I beg you! 🙏😭).

  • Better mind control/hypnosis description for how the characters will perceive and react to you (the protagonist) before, during, and after you use your power on them.

  • A more concise First Message as the introduction.

  • A new Jailbreak (is the OCC text between the brackets at the start of the description), which you can copy from the character's Personality Description and paste into your Proxy's Jailbreak.

  • Better Example Dialogues.

  • No gender specific protagonist (I don't care what you are, just enjoy the bot).

    ㅤ

ㅤ

Recommendation: What AI Model do I recommend?

Use a free Deepseek or a free GLM model, just search "free deepseek janitorai" or "free glm janitorai" and check any recent tutorials about it on YouTube (it takes less than 10 minutes to set up in Janitor, and it makes the chats so much better). You can also use other free versions of AI models like: Kwaipilot KAT, MoonshotAI Kimi, Qwen, Nemotron, etc...

ㅤ

ㅤ
